# task\-active\-claim\-overlap\-warnings — Warn when active claims have overlapping file hints
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-git

Add conservative warnings for likely collisions between active claims\. Compare task path\_hints and any known changed files from handoffs/claims so agents get early notice when parallel work may touch the same files or directories\.

## Acceptance
- A shared core helper finds likely overlaps between active claims using task path\_hints and available changed\_files metadata\.
- Briefs warn about active claims in the same scope and overlapping file hints or changed files\.
- Generated status or active\-work context includes concise overlap warnings for humans\.
- Validation emits warnings, not errors, for likely overlap and includes the involved task/claim ids\.
- Warnings explain that path\-hint overlap is advisory and may be a false positive\.
- Tests cover exact file overlap, directory\-prefix overlap, same\-scope warning, and no\-overlap cases\.
- bun test, typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate are clean\.
